title: Industrial Base Policy
text:
The Department of War National Defense Executive Reserve (NDER) Program is composed of senior civilian talent from outside of the federal government. Members are on call to provide strategic expertise, critical analysis, and rapid response support to the national security enterprise in the event of an emergency.
The Office of the Assistant Secretary of War for Industrial Base Policy, recognizing the urgent need to revitalize the defense industrial base, invites senior civilian experts to express interest in serving in the NDER. Learn how you can contribute your expertise to future DoW initiatives by emailing our team here.
